cases.name: wrong returned kind is rejected
cases.expectError: Stage 3 output validation failed for section "planned-concept-card": expected kind "concept-card" but received "claim-card".

cases.name: missing required output field is rejected
cases.expectError: Stage 3 output validation failed for section "planned-concept-card": missing required field "explanation".

cases.name: missing source block ID is rejected
cases.expectError: Stage 3 source block ID "missing-block" was not found for section "planned-concept-card".

cases.name: provider failure is wrapped with section context
cases.expectError: Stage 3 provider generation failed for section "planned-concept-card": simulated provider outage

cases.name: section outside plan is rejected
cases.expectError: Planned section "planned-concept-card" is not part of generation plan "stage3-plan".

cases.name: wrong output source block IDs are rejected
cases.expectError: Stage 3 output validation failed for section "planned-concept-card": sourceBlockIds must match the planned section source block IDs.

cases.name: wrong output planned section ID is rejected
cases.expectError: Stage 3 output validation failed for section "planned-concept-card": plannedSectionId must be "planned-concept-card".

cases.name: missing section is rejected
cases.expectError: Stage 3 generation requires a planned section.

cases.name: missing plan is rejected
cases.expectError: Stage 3 generation requires a generation plan.

cases.name: missing source is rejected
cases.expectError: Stage 3 generation requires a normalized source.

cases.name: missing provider is rejected
cases.expectError: Stage 3 generation requires a generation provider.
